endpoints.name: GET /v1/{customer}/apps:countChromeAppRequests
endpoints.description: Generate summary of app installation requests.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMER}} with a real customer.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{customer}/reports:countChromeHardwareFleetDevices
endpoints.description: Counts of devices with a specific hardware specification from the requested hardware type (for example model name, processor type). Further information can be found here https://support.google.com/chrome/a/answer/10564947
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMER}} with a real customer.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{customer}/reports:countChromeVersions
endpoints.description: Generate report of installed Chrome versions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMER}} with a real customer.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{customer}/reports:countInstalledApps
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMER}} with a real customer.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{customer}/reports:findInstalledAppDevices
endpoints.description: Generate report of managed Chrome browser devices that have a specified app installed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CUSTOMER}} with a real customer.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/telemetry/devices
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/telemetry/events
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/telemetry/users
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
